use_cases: Abstract animated background for hero sections on creative portfolio sites
Visual loading or transition effect for dev-tool and SaaS applications
Immersive visual layer for 3D visualization demos and experiments
Dynamic canvas background for live streaming overlays or media platforms
ai_summary: A WebGL shader art component using raymarching techniques to render an abstract geometric tunnel effect with time-based animation. The shader combines trigonometric functions and geometric distance calculations to create intricate patterns with smooth tone mapping, producing a hypnotic, continuously evolving visual display suitable as an animated background or artistic element.
